import io
import string

fn capitalize_word(_ word: String) -> String
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(word, 0)
  match b_opt
  when None
    word
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let upper = string.from_byte(b - 32)
      let rest = string.substring(word, 1, string.len(word))
      "#{upper}#{rest}"
    else
      word
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = words.len()

  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let word = match words.get(i)
    when Some(w)
      w
    when None
      ""
    end
    let cap = capitalize_word(word)
    if i == 0
      result = cap
    else
      result = "#{result} #{cap}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
